description: 伺服器中介軟體設定 — CORS、Rate Limit、Middleware — Ambiguous
generation_guidelines: Generate server middleware and security configuration values. Cover: CORS allowed origins (* or specific domains), rate limiting config (max_requests, window_ms), CSRF token settings, content security policy directives, cookie settings (secure, httpOnly, sameSite), session timeout values, HTTP security headers (HSTS, X-Frame-Options). These reveal security posture but aren't directly exploitable individual values. Paths: root.security, root.middleware, root.cors, root.session, root.csp.

examples.text: Path: root.security.cors | Key: allowed_origins | Struct: Leaf | Val: "*"
Path: root.middleware | Key: rate_limit | Struct: Leaf | Val: "100/minute"
Path: root.session | Key: timeout_minutes | Struct: Leaf | Val: "1440"
